name: alterlab-anndata
description: Build, slice, concatenate, read, and write AnnData annotated data matrices (obs, var, X, layers, obsm, uns) — the scverse data STRUCTURE, not an analysis pipeline. Use when creating or wrangling .h5ad/zarr files, managing cell and gene annotations, concatenating batches, or handling layers/obsm/backed-mode; for the QC, normalization, clustering, UMAP, and differential-expression analysis pipeline prefer alterlab-scanpy instead, and for RNA velocity from spliced/unspliced layers prefer alterlab-s
author: AlterLab-IEU
